stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is a true statement in respect to a departure along CATON 2C from Alicante, Spain?

options.a: Minimum altitude along the departure route from VILNA to NARGO is FL110.
options.b: The distance between VILNA and NARGO is roughly 15 NM.
options.c: There is no speed restriction on this departure.
options.d: Minimum climb gradient required is 5.0% until reaching FL70.
